title: Contact YEBW people — specific-skills + e-commerce seed
html:
TL;DR

  • Post-YEBW follow-up to-do: document the experience, challenge self at school, find a clean improvement area, start doing what you love.
  • Names the specific skills triple Yahir wanted to invest in at age 17: Chinese, AI, Business — already-named in Sep 10 but here it shows up first as an explicit acquisition list, not a wish.
  • Floats the path-architecture: Start in internships → Travel abroad — the seed that becomes the YES Kennedy Lugar / CIEE / Shanghai arc.
  • Two business seeds dropped in the same six lines: Start e-commerce? — subscription box, and a cryptic "motor up" boat-branding note (likely an FBLA-event business-plan slogan).
  • Sits in the Aug 12-22 prep cluster — same week as 2019 08 12 keep things simple, 2019 08 15 credentials and ceo maxims, finance graph slide track, and junior year schedule swap (which moves the Mandarin period to make this whole portfolio possible).

Notes

The YEBW connection is now load-bearing. YEBW (Young Entrepreneurs Business Week) was Yahir's pre-college summer business-pitch program — the "director of YEBW" is one of the contacts he flags to keep in the 2019 08 12 keep things simple note. This Aug 18 note is the morning-after version: who do I email, what was the lesson, what did I commit to.

The triple — Chinese, AI, Business — is striking because by August 2019 it's already a deliberate stack. Chinese tracks with the Mandarin-class scheduling agitation in 2019 08 22 change the location of mandarin 3. AI tracks with the April 2020 "learn about AI and make it useful for all" line — eight months before COVID, two years before ChatGPT. Business is the FBLA/YEBW lane he was already running.

"Start e-commerce? — subscription box" is one of the recurring bridge income flirtations across his teen years (FBA, Costco contacts, sports-cards flips). The subscription-box trope is mid-2010s Birchbox / Dollar-Shave-Club residue — generic, but it stays in the corpus.

"Write motor up in boat" is opaque without context — likely a slide / business-plan visual where a boat illustrates "starting up" momentum.

Open questions

  • Is YEBW a Ford- or Junior-Achievement-affiliated program? The "director" framing suggests a real org with a small staff.
  • Did the e-commerce subscription-box ever get prototyped? No follow-up in the surfaced corpus.

Connections

  • 2019 08 12 keep things simple — YEBW first-mention; same prep cluster
  • 2019 08 22 change the location of mandarin 3 — schedule-rework to enable Chinese
  • 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end — Chinese/AI/business triple recurs
  • yebw · fbla · grants pass teen era · bridge income strategies · ciee · yes kennedy lugar
